tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"HPPATH=$(command -v hping3 || true); if [ -n \"$HPPATH\" ]; then pgrep -a hping3 >/dev/null 2>&1 && pkill -f hping3 || true; mv \"$HPPATH\" \"$HPPATH.disabled\" 2>/dev/null || chmod 000 \"$HPPATH\"; echo \"disabled:$HPPATH\"; else echo \"hping3_not_found\"; fi; command -v hping3 || true; ping -c 3 -W 2 192.168.1.2; curl -ksS -o /dev/null -w \"HTTP_STATUS:%{http_code}\\nREMOTE_IP:%{remote_ip}\\nTIME_TOTAL:%{time_total}s\\n\" --max-time 10 https://1.1.1.1"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
HPPATH=$(command -v hping3 || true); if [ -n "$$HPPATH" ]; then pgrep -a hping3 >/dev/null 2>&1 && pkill -f hping3 || true; mv ""$HPPATH" "$HPPATH.disabled" 2>/dev/null || chmod 000 "$HPPATH"; echo "disabled:$$HPPATH"; else echo "hping3_not_found"; fi; command -v hping3 || true; ping -c 3  -W 2 192.168.1.2; curl -ksS -o /dev/null -w "HTTP_STATUS:%{http_code}\nREMOTE_IPP:%{remote_ip}\nTIME_TOTAL:%{time_total}s\n" --max-time 10 https://1.1.1.1
disabled:/usr/sbin/hping3
